name: Arte Salon Holdings,Inc.
summary: Arte Salon Holdings,Inc., through its subsidiaries, operates and franchises salons. It operates a chain of 323 stores in Japan and internationally. The company was formerly known as ARTEJAPAN CO., LTD. and changed its name to ARTE Salon Holdings, Inc. in July 2006. ARTE Salon Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
